privileged_info_summary: The task relies on a synthetically generated Sweet Home 3D file, built by dynamically stripping out all existing furniture and room names from a sample file. The task requires the agent to subdivide an open floor plan into a dormitory by placing at least 5 new partition walls, at least 4 doors (measured broadly as any element with the `doorOrWindow='true'` XML attribute, meaning windows also pass this check), defining at least 5 named rooms, and outfitting them with a strictly quantified set of furniture (e.g., 16 beds, 8 desks, 4 toilets). The verifier parses the XML of the resulting `.sh3d` file using substring keyword matching against the `name` attribute of `pieceOfFurniture` nodes, and grades the agent on a 100-point scale with a pass threshold of 70. A wrong-target gate immediately fails the evaluation if fewer than 10 total furniture items are placed.
